falsification_conditions.condition: Blowoff score increases to 60 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant rise in blowoff score would indicate excessive momentum, invalidating the 'HOLD' signal by suggesting a potential reversal or breakout

falsification_conditions.condition: Pattern match similarity to bottom_2024_aug drops below 50%
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A substantial decrease in pattern similarity would indicate the current market behavior diverges from the historical bottom pattern, undermining the basis for the 'UNKNOWN' verdict

falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above 5,200 (2024 August bottom level) by Day 14
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear price breakout above the historical bottom level would directly contradict the 'HOLD' signal, proving the current call wrong through observable price action

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
